name: fairshare
description: Fair bill splitting calculator for couples based on salary proportions.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:cypress && npm run test:a11y
scripts.build:icons: shx mkdir -p dist/icons dist/images && svgo -f icons -o dist/icons && svgo -f images -o dist/images && svgo favicon.svg logo-icon.svg logo-icon-dark.svg -o dist/ && svgo -f icons -o icons && svgo -f images -o images && svgo favicon.svg logo-icon.svg logo-icon-dark.svg -o .
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run build:icons

author: Ash Davies (DrizzlyOwl) and Gemini
